pi_items.source: Task description and verifier logic require transcoding to mp4/mkv/mp3, matching exact h264/aac/mp3 specs, resolution, framerate, and creating a JSON manifest.
Task operates on preparing a master video for four platforms via transcoding and outputting a deliverables manifest.

pi_items.verified_value: Media and Communication Workers, All Other (SOC 27-3099)
pi_items.source: Web search for SOC 27-3099 and task context. The prompt describes the user as a 'digital content coordinator' which falls under the 'All Other' category of Media and Communication Workers.
Task description simulates a media distribution company preparing content for broadcast, mobile, web streaming, and audio-only podcast platforms.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on synthetic data. A master video is generated using FFmpeg with the 'testsrc2' and 'sine' lavfi filters, resulting in a 60-second 1080p video with 440Hz and 880Hz audio tones. The target platforms require precise transcoding using specific codecs (h264, aac, mp3), resolutions, framerates, and audio configurations, explicitly verified by the task scripts.
